title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.16 — PARTS-CATALOG UNIFORM GRID (user direction: 60s console rule — design the console around the buttons; 2 button sizes, not 3+). Module row: three EQUAL-width panels, ONE standard cell (STD 46px high, 2-col) console-wide; COMPRESS folded from 4-col to 2-col (6 rows, G/R strip spans the last row); GRIT = HERO selector + 6 identical STD tiles (the image-2 face); AMBER = 5 STD rows with HARDWARE moved from header chip into the grid next to MIX; spare rows filled with screwed-on BlankPlate components; cellHFor fill-the-panel heights retired. Bottom row: ONE utility height 32 for SUMMING header tiles + LIMITER stack. VERIFY IN ABLETON: every tile on the console is one of TWO module sizes (hero/std) or the one utility size; row lines align across panels; blank plates read as unpopulated console positions; COMPRESS legends still fit at 148px-wide cells; AMBER HARDWARE selector works as a tile. OPEN: painted-metal chassis fork. Remaining UI punch-list unchanged.
